en: It took a few years to get there
ko: 거기까지 가는 데 몇 년이 걸렸어

en: I must've had the time for it
Nobody said you can't park here
ko: 아무도 여기 주차하면 안 된다고 안 했어

en: Yeah, you bet I got fine for it
If all my anger gets split in two
Oh, I'll give half to you
And you'll never know, you just might see me
ko: 넌 모르겠지만, 어쩌면 나를 볼 수도 있어
